MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST.description:
A lost psychic in search of purpose.
He wields his few remaining memories as sword and shield both.
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST.banter.alive.endTurn: I didn't remember you being so slow...
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST.cardsModifierDescrip: __ cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST.goldMonologue: A grand memory in the making...
MNEMONIST-MNEMONIST.title: The Mnemonist
